description: Build the complete CCT Rectangle Bot from scratch - all modules including data loading, multi-timeframe strategy logic, backtesting engine, and results output
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/requirements.txt with dependencies: yfinance, pandas, numpy, ta (technical analysis library)

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/config.py with all strategy parameters: EMA periods (50, 200), risk per trade (0.5-2%), minimum RR ratio (3:1), timeframes (4H, 15M, 1M), session times (Asia, London, NY), and symbol configuration

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/data_loader.py that fetches multi-timeframe OHLC data using yfinance. Must support 4H, 15M, and 1M timeframes. Include functions to resample data if needed. Support gold (GC=F), EURUSD (EURUSD=X), or other liquid pairs.

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/utils.py with helper functions: calculate_ema(), detect_fair_value_gap(), identify_session_levels() (Asia/London/NY highs and lows), calculate_swing_highs_lows(), check_imbalance()

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/strategy.py implementing the FULL CCT Rectangle strategy with these components: (a) DirectionDetector class - identifies 4H CCT directional candles (bullish: sweeps prev low + closes above prev high; bearish: sweeps prev high + closes below prev low), marks next candle open as reference. Must check EMA alignment (price above 50/200 EMA = longs only, below = shorts only). (b) WeaknessDetector class - on 15M, finds swing highs/lows aligned with 4H direction, checks if price sweeps level but FAILS to close beyond it (wick rejection = weakness), filters for levels inside FVG or at session extremes. If price closes beyond level = strength = no trade. (c) RectangleEntry class - draws rectangle from M15 trigger candle close to its extreme (wick tip), on 1M waits for candle to close outside rectangle for entry trigger, sets stop loss beyond rectangle extreme, target is 3:1 RR minimum or next key M15 level. (d) TradeChecklist class - validates all required conditions: direction aligned (EMA), valid structure, continuation focus, imbalance filter, wick rejection confirmed, rectangle drawn.

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/backtester.py with a BacktestEngine class that: loads multi-timeframe data, iterates through time synchronizing 4H/15M/1M candles, applies strategy logic sequentially (direction -> weakness -> entry), tracks open positions with SL/TP, calculates trade results (entry price, exit price, PnL, RR achieved), computes statistics (win rate, total trades, avg RR, max drawdown, total return, profit factor)

Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/CCT_Rectangle_Bot/main.py as the entry point that: installs/imports all modules, configures the backtest parameters (symbol, date range, risk settings), runs the backtest, prints formatted results showing each trade (entry time, direction, entry price, SL, TP, RR, outcome) and summary statistics (total trades, wins, losses, win rate, avg RR, total return, profit factor, max drawdown)
acceptance_criteria: All Python files are created and syntactically valid
Strategy implements ALL rules from specification: 4H direction candle detection with EMA filter, 15M weakness detection with wick rejection, 1M rectangle entry with proper SL/TP
Running python main.py produces trade results with statistics
Output shows individual trades with entry, SL, TP, RR, and outcome
Output shows summary: win rate, total trades, profit factor, total return
